whyMe.title: Why me
whyMe.about: I am passionate about programming because analytical thinking, creativity, perseverance, and collaboration help me solve problems in a structured way and continuously develop and create better solutions.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.motivation: I am currently learning React and Vue.js and am constantly honing my skills to implement innovative solutions and keep up with new technologies

subtitle.process: How I have organised my work process

bubble.about:
This App is a Slack Clone App.
It revolutionizes team communication and collaboration with its intuitive interface, real-time messaging, and robust channel organization.
bubble.process: How do you keep your code clean and maintainable? Have you broken the project down into reusable modules or components? Focus on documentation, naming files, variables, classes and testing.
bubble.group: How many people were in the team and what was your role? Describe your tasks in 1-2 sentences, for example: login form, dashboard or chat functionality. What technologies did you use? It is nice to mention good teamwork and cooperation.

pollo.about: A simple Jump-and-Run game based on an object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and poison bottles to fight against the killer Chicken.
pollo.process: I organize my workflow in a structured manner by breaking projects down into reusable components and modules, while adhering to clear naming conventions for files, variables, and classes to keep the code clean and maintainable. I also prioritize clear documentation to ensure the structure remains easy to follow at all times, and I work incrementally to identify and prevent errors early on.
pollo.group: Through my projects, I have learned to work in a structured and solution-oriented manner and to quickly familiarize myself with new technologies. In the process, I have been able to apply various frameworks and programming languages in practice and continuously deepen my understanding of modern web development. Clean implementation, clear structure, and the constant improvement of my skills through real-world project work were particularly important to me.

join.about: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
join.process: I organize my workflow in a structured manner by breaking projects down into reusable components and modules, while adhering to clear naming conventions for files, variables, and classes to keep the code clean and maintainable. I also prioritize clear documentation to ensure the structure remains easy to follow at all times, and I work incrementally to identify and prevent errors early on.
join.group: My experience with group work has shown that I enjoy collaborating with others to develop solutions together. In doing so, I've been able to better identify the team's strengths and weaknesses and assess my own abilities more realistically. As a result, we've supported and helped each other grow, and we've improved our work processes step by step.

ongoing.about: What are you currently working on and what features are you implementing? What is the key to success in your projects? You can mention good planning, code quality and execution.
ongoing.about2: Show a desire to learn new technologies and continually improve your skills.

references.title: Need a teamplayer? Here what my colleagues said about me

bubble.quote: Annes worked with the team to develop, organize, and implement content. He is reliable, helpful, and a pleasure to work with.

join.quote: Annes is reliable and friendly, organizes his tasks efficiently, and writes code that's easy to understand. I highly recommend him as a colleague.

pollo.quote: He is a reliable team player who remains calm and focused even under time pressure. His work is well-organized, and his code is clear and easy to follow.

contact.title: Contact me
contact.intro: Feel free to get in touch with me for job opportunities or collaboration requests. I'm always open to new projects where I can contribute, learn, and grow as a developer. I aim to add value through clean, structured code and a problem-solving mindset that helps bring ideas to life.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been submitted.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later or use the email link above.
contact.emailInvalid: Your email looks invalid. Check that @ and a domain ending (e.g. .com, .de) are present. *
contact.messageError: Message must be at least 10 characters long *
contact.privacyCheckboxAfter: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.acceptanceHtml: By accessing and using this Portfolio, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the Portfolio.
legalNotice.scopeTitle: Scope and ownership of the product
legalNotice.scopeHtml: The Portfolio and related materials are provided in connection with educational coursework. Developer Akademie GmbH retains ownership of the underlying curriculum structure, branding, and proprietary teaching assets. Your Portfolio implementation may include your own original work subject to the licence terms communicated during the programme.
legalNotice.proprietaryHtml: All intellectual property rights in materials owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, including but not limited to templates, briefings, and reference designs, remain the property of Developer Akademie GmbH. Your public Portfolio may display attribution as required by your agreement with the provider.
legalNotice.useHtml: You agree to use the Portfolio only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of others or restrict their use of the Portfolio. You must not attempt to gain unauthorised access to any systems, scrape content at scale in breach of applicable rules, or misrepresent the origin of work shown in your Portfolio.
legalNotice.disclaimerTitle: Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability
legalNotice.disclaimerHtml: The Portfolio is provided “as is” for demonstration purposes. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Developer Akademie disclaims all warranties and shall not be liable for any indirect or consequential loss arising from use of the Portfolio.
legalNotice.indemnityHtml: You agree to indemnify Developer Akademie against claims arising from misuse of your Portfolio or breach of these terms, except where such liability cannot be excluded under mandatory law.
legalNotice.contactFooterHtml: For questions or notices, you can reach me at +49 (0) 163 221 6668.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introHtml: This privacy policy explains how personal data is processed in connection with this Portfolio when you contact us or use the website.
privacyPolicy.controllerHtml: The controller under applicable data protection law is the person or organisation named in the Portfolio / legal notice and, where the training programme is concerned, Developer Akademie GmbH as the provider of the curriculum. Specific contact details are listed in the legal notice.
privacyPolicy.dataHtml: Depending on how you use the site, we may process your name, email address, and message content from the contact form, as well as technical metadata (e.g. browser type, time of request). Content of your public Portfolio is visible to visitors as you publish it.
privacyPolicy.purposeHtml: We process data to respond to enquiries, operate the website, and—within cooperation with Developer Akademie GmbH—document training outcomes where necessary.
privacyPolicy.legalBasisHtml: Where you contact us, processing is based on steps prior to a contract or on Article 6(1)(b) GDPR, or—where we pursue legitimate interests in a secure website—Article 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacyPolicy.retentionHtml: Contact messages are kept only as long as needed to handle your request or meet statutory retention duties, then deleted or anonymised.
privacyPolicy.rightsHtml: Subject to applicable law, you have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, and objection. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. The controller named in the Portfolio is your primary contact.
privacyPolicy.cookiesHtml: This site may use technically necessary cookies or local storage (for example for language preference). Consent is only required for non-essential cookies.
